name: claude-notifier
description: Plays distinct sounds when Claude Code finishes a task or needs your input

commands.title: Claude Notifier: Install terminal-notifier (clickable macOS notifications)
Claude Notifier: Set up remote audio (play sounds locally over SSH)…

claudeNotifier.taskCompleted.level.description: Notification level when Claude finishes a task.

claudeNotifier.taskCompleted.sound.description: Sound preset when Claude finishes a task. macOS: Basso–Tink. Windows: Windows Notify–Windows Background.

claudeNotifier.needsPermission.level.description: Notification level when Claude needs permission to use a tool.

claudeNotifier.needsPermission.sound.description: Sound preset when Claude needs permission. macOS: Basso–Tink. Windows: Windows Notify–Windows Background.

claudeNotifier.asksQuestion.level.description: Notification level when Claude asks you a question.

claudeNotifier.asksQuestion.sound.description: Sound preset when Claude asks a question. macOS: Basso–Tink. Windows: Windows Notify–Windows Background.

claudeNotifier.subagentCompleted.level.description: Notification level when a Task subagent finishes. Off by default — subagents are typically internal detail.

claudeNotifier.subagentCompleted.sound.description: Sound preset when a Task subagent finishes. macOS: Basso–Tink. Windows: Windows Notify–Windows Background.

claudeNotifier.soundVolume.description: Volume multiplier applied to all notification sounds. 1 = system default, 2 = boosted (~200%). Honored on Linux (paplay) and macOS (afplay). Windows ignores this — Media.SoundPlayer has no volume API.

claudeNotifier.minTaskDurationThreshold.description: Suppress notification sounds and popups for tasks that complete in less than this many seconds. Counted from when you submit the prompt. 0 disables the feature (all notifications fire normally).

claudeNotifier.suppressSubagentInteracti.description: When true, permission and question hooks fired from inside a Task subagent (detected via the agent_id field in the hook payload) are silenced — no sound, no popup. The main agent's own permission/question prompts still fire normally. Useful in auto-accept mode where subagent prompts are noise.

claudeNotifier.doneDebounceMs.deprecationMessage: Deprecated and ignored. Per-session stage dedup replaces it. Safe to delete from your settings.
claudeNotifier.doneDebounceMs.description: Deprecated and ignored. Per-session stage dedup handles rapid 'done' signal coalescing.

claudeNotifier.remoteAudio.enabled.markdownDescription: Play notification sounds on your **local** machine when Claude runs on a **remote** host (SSH, WSL, dev container). Requires the `cn-daemon` helper running locally and an SSH reverse forward — see [docs/REMOTE_HOSTS.md](https://github.com/ashmitb95/claude-notifier/blob/main/docs/REMOTE_HOSTS.md). When off, remote sessions fall back to the terminal bell.

claudeNotifier.remoteAudio.port.markdownDescription: Loopback port the local `cn-daemon` listens on and the reverse forward targets (`RemoteForward <port> localhost:<port>`). Only change this if 47291 conflicts with another service.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:hook
